name: cunning3d-gaea-flywheel
description: Install and run the canonical Cunning3D Gaea flywheel inside Praxis.

interface.shortDescription: Install the real Gaea flywheel CLI and inspect its canonical status.
interface.longDescription: Cunning3D product plugin that owns and distributes the canonical c3d_devflywheeltool runtime, ledgers, and execution contract, then renders CLI-owned node status in the chat TUI.

commands.name: gaeawheel
commands.description: Open the Gaea flywheel node progress panel.
